# TMW2Play — Tell Me What to Play

> AI-powered game recommendation platform. Connect your Steam account and let Google Gemini AI analyze your library to suggest what to play next.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with Steam username input and app overview
- [Profile](/Profile/:steamUser): User's Steam profile with game statistics, charts, and AI-powered recommendations

## Features

- Steam library analysis — fetches and analyzes owned games, playtime, and achievements
- AI game recommendations — Google Gemini generates personalized suggestions based on your play history
- Interactive statistics — charts and insights about your gaming habits
- Multi-language — English (EN-US) and Brazilian Portuguese (PT-BR)
- Responsive design — works on desktop and mobile

## Tech Stack

- Angular 21 (frontend SPA)
- .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core (REST API backend)
- Google Gemini API (AI recommendations)
- Steam Web API (game library data)

## API

The backend REST API is just a gateway, nothing special. It has just some endpoints relate to Steam profile loading and AI recommendation generation.
